title: corybas cheesemanii
intro: Corybas cheesemanii, also known as the Cheeseman's orchid, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which may be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and possessing antioxidant properties. Corybas cheesemanii can be prepared as a herbal remedy, often in the form of a tea or tincture, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
